content: The Asset Management module is a comprehensive digital solution designed to efficiently manage and monitor the complete lifecycle of organizational assets within Urban Local Bodies (ULBs). It enables systematic handling of assets from their creation and acquisition to assignment, maintenance, and disposal, ensuring transparency, accountability, and operational efficiency.
combined: [Asset Management] The Asset Management module is a comprehensive digital solution designed to efficiently manage and monitor the complete lifecycle of organizational assets within Urban Local Bodies (ULBs). It enables systematic handling of assets from their creation and acquisition to assignment, maintenance, and disposal, ensuring transparency, accountability, and operational efficiency.

content: The module supports a structured workflow involving multiple levels of verification and approval, ensuring that all asset-related data and supporting documents are thoroughly validated before being recorded in the system. Once approved, assets can be assigned to employees or departments, allowing clear ownership tracking and improved utilization.
combined: [Asset Management] The module supports a structured workflow involving multiple levels of verification and approval, ensuring that all asset-related data and supporting documents are thoroughly validated before being recorded in the system. Once approved, assets can be assigned to employees or departments, allowing clear ownership tracking and improved utilization.

content: Additionally, the system facilitates key processes such as asset return, maintenance scheduling, depreciation tracking, and disposal management. Features like QR code tagging enable quick identification and real-time access to asset information, while automated depreciation calculations assist in maintaining accurate financial records.
combined: [Asset Management] Additionally, the system facilitates key processes such as asset return, maintenance scheduling, depreciation tracking, and disposal management. Features like QR code tagging enable quick identification and real-time access to asset information, while automated depreciation calculations assist in maintaining accurate financial records.

content: The module also provides reporting and analytics capabilities, enabling decision-makers to monitor asset performance, plan maintenance, and ensure compliance with audit and regulatory requirements. Overall, the Asset Management system enhances governance, optimizes resource utilization, and supports data-driven decision-making within the organization.

content: Property Tax (PT) Assessment and Payment is a self-serve web and mobile-based, easy-to-use and configurable product that addresses the objectives of municipal corporations and local government to automate all property tax operations, thus providing property tax assessment and payment services to citizens in real-time.
combined: [Property Tax Assessment and Payment] Property Tax (PT) Assessment and Payment is a self-serve web and mobile-based, easy-to-use and configurable product that addresses the objectives of municipal corporations and local government to automate all property tax operations, thus providing property tax assessment and payment services to citizens in real-time.

content: The Property Tax (PT) Assessment and Payment module offers the citizens and governance bodies a convenient and transparent means of processing property taxes. Local governing bodies identify the applicable tax slabs for different types of properties. The PT module assesses properties, calculates tax amount, processes tax payment and generates tax collection reports.
combined: [Property Tax Assessment and Payment] The Property Tax (PT) Assessment and Payment module offers the citizens and governance bodies a convenient and transparent means of processing property taxes. Local governing bodies identify the applicable tax slabs for different types of properties. The PT module assesses properties, calculates tax amount, processes tax payment and generates tax collection reports.

content: Pet Registration is a user-friendly, web and mobile-based platform tailored for local government bodies to regulate pet ownership effectively. This intuitive system allows pet owners to register their pets conveniently, ensuring compliance with regulations and guidelines set by the government for responsible pet ownership. It facilitates streamlined pet registration processes, promoting accountability among pet owners and enhancing community safety. Authorities can manage pet populations efficiently, track vaccinations, and enforce regulations related to pet care and control.

content: The Water Tanker Citizen Request Service is a digital platform that enables citizens to request water tanker supply for domestic, public, or emergency needs. It eliminates the need for physical visits to municipal offices by offering an online, user-friendly interface for submitting requests, selecting tanker size, and specifying delivery details.
combined: [Water Tanker Citizen Request Service] The Water Tanker Citizen Request Service is a digital platform that enables citizens to request water tanker supply for domestic, public, or emergency needs. It eliminates the need for physical visits to municipal offices by offering an online, user-friendly interface for submitting requests, selecting tanker size, and specifying delivery details.

content: The module ensures efficient coordination between citizens and municipal authorities or vendors, with real-time tracking, notifications, and a structured workflow for request processing, payment, and service delivery. It enhances service accessibility, transparency, and timely fulfillment of water supply requirements.
combined: [Water Tanker Citizen Request Service] The module ensures efficient coordination between citizens and municipal authorities or vendors, with real-time tracking, notifications, and a structured workflow for request processing, payment, and service delivery. content: Water & Sewerage Connection Management
combined: [Water & Sewerage Connection Management] Water & Sewerage Connection Management

content: The Water & Sewerage Connection Management module offers a consolidated platform for managing new and existing water and sewerage connections. The module eliminates the need for manual processing and streamlines the key water or sewerage management functions for operational efficiency. Water & Sewerage (W&S) Connection Management module enables automated processing of new connection requests, generating water bills, and facilitating online payment of bills.
combined: [Water & Sewerage Connection Management] The Water & Sewerage Connection Management module offers a consolidated platform for managing new and existing water and sewerage connections. The module eliminates the need for manual processing and streamlines the key water or sewerage management functions for operational efficiency. Water & Sewerage (W&S) Connection Management module enables automated processing of new connection requests, generating water bills, and facilitating online payment of bills.

content: The W&S Connection management module allows citizens to apply for new connections and pay bills online. For employees, this module enables automated processing of new connection requests, editing existing connection details, generating water bills, and facilitating online collection of bill payments.
combined: [Water & Sewerage Connection Management] The W&S Connection management module allows citizens to apply for new connections and pay bills online. content: The Tree Pruning Citizen Request Service is a digital platform that enables citizens to raise requests for trimming or pruning overgrown, damaged, or obstructive trees within urban areas. The module facilitates efficient coordination between citizens and municipal authorities to ensure timely action for maintaining public safety and infrastructure.
combined: [Tree Pruning Citizen Request Service] The Tree Pruning Citizen Request Service is a digital platform that enables citizens to raise requests for trimming or pruning overgrown, damaged, or obstructive trees within urban areas. content: It helps address issues such as obstruction to roads, streetlights, buildings, and electrical lines by allowing citizens to submit requests with location details and supporting evidence. content: The Mobile Toilet Citizen Request Service is a digital platform that enables citizens, event organizers, and institutions to request temporary mobile toilet facilities for public or private events. The module facilitates seamless coordination between citizens and authorized sanitation vendors for installation, servicing, and removal of mobile toilet units.
combined: [Mobile Toilet Citizen Request Service] The Mobile Toilet Citizen Request Service is a digital platform that enables citizens, event organizers, and institutions to request temporary mobile toilet facilities for public or private events. The module facilitates seamless coordination between citizens and authorized sanitation vendors for installation, servicing, and removal of mobile toilet units.

content: The system captures essential details such as location, duration, number of units required, and event type through a structured workflow. Vendors can manage requests, schedule delivery, and mark services as completed. The platform ensures transparency through real-time tracking, notifications, and service confirmations, thereby improving urban sanitation services and public convenience.

content: Building Plan Approval System
combined: [Building Plan Approval System] Building Plan Approval System

content: The BPA module automates the entire building plan approval process right from enabling online submission of plans, documents to initiating verification and final approval of the plan. Citizens can now track their plan approval or inspection status, pay fees online, download and print the Permit Order and Occupancy Certificate online. The module streamlines the building plan approval system with configurable workflows for effective management through different phases of approval.
combined: [Building Plan Approval System] The BPA module automates the entire building plan approval process right from enabling online submission of plans, documents to initiating verification and final approval of the plan. Citizens can now track their plan approval or inspection status, pay fees online, download and print the Permit Order and Occupancy Certificate online. The module streamlines the building plan approval system with configurable workflows for effective management through different phases of approval.

content: This is to Fastrack the Building Permit Application for which the state has notified Pre approved drawings. These are Low-risk projects, so the applicant doesn’t need the Architect/Technical person to get his/her project approved. The applicant can choose from the various plan options provided in UPYOG and can submit the respective permit application directly to the Approver skipping document verification and field inspection stages.

content: Street Vendors Management
combined: [Street Vendors Management] Street Vendors Management

content: The Street Vendors Management module is a user-friendly, web and mobile-based platform designed to assist Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) in managing street vending activities. It enables street vendors to apply for vending certificates and allows ULB officials to process, verify, and regulate vending operations across the city. The module promotes fair vending practices, compliance with local regulations, and systematic urban space management.
combined: [Street Vendors Management] The Street Vendors Management module is a user-friendly, web and mobile-based platform designed to assist Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) in managing street vending activities. It enables street vendors to apply for vending certificates and allows ULB officials to process, verify, and regulate vending operations across the city. The module promotes fair vending practices, compliance with local regulations, and systematic urban space management.

content: The Street Vendors Management module allows vendors to submit applications for vending certificates, get them verified, make payments, and download their vending certificate. ULB employees and field inspectors are part of a role-based workflow to validate and approve these applications. After one year, vendors can also renew their vending certificate through the same portal.

ULB employees and field inspectors are part of a role-based workflow to validate and approve these applications. After one year, vendors can also renew their vending certificate through the same portal.

content: The Miscellaneous Collections module is designed to facilitate the ULBs process of miscellaneous types of payments. Miscellaneous payments may include parking fees, advertising fees, rent, challans, etc. The module objective is to process and record payment collections on account of miscellaneous heads within the ULBs. This makes it easy to track payment receipts and generate reports for administrative purposes.

This makes it easy to track payment receipts and generate reports for administrative purposes.

content: The Desludging Service module allows citizens to create applications for desludging, configure multiple trips and pay the fees for the service delivery online. The module makes it easier to operate and manage a desludging service. It eliminates the current manual process by streamlining it and capturing information end-to-end ensuring waste pick up and its disposal at the correct treatment plant. This ensures a better citizen service experience with the Urban Local Body (ULB) while promoting a cleaner/healthier environment.

module: NMAM - Compliant Municipal Finance and Accounting
content: NMAM - Compliant Municipal Finance and Accounting is a key module in web-based integrated ERP software that enables municipalities to create and manage financial transactions like budget, revenue demand, receipt, advances, deposits, bills, payments, asset creation(capitalization), fund transfer and also reconciliations and reporting.
combined: [NMAM - Compliant Municipal Finance and Accounting] NMAM - Compliant Municipal Finance and Accounting is a key module in web-based integrated ERP software that enables municipalities to create and manage financial transactions like budget, revenue demand, receipt, advances, deposits, bills, payments, asset creation(capitalization), fund transfer and also reconciliations and reporting.

module: NMAM - Compliant Municipal Finance and Accounting
content: NMAM - Compliant Municipal Finance and Accounting enables municipalities to maintain financial records of ULBs following established procedures and practices. The module follows a fund based double-entry accrual accounting system designed to synch with the standards outlined in the National Municipal Accounting Manual.

content: Community Hall / Venue Booking
combined: [Community Hall _ Venue Booking] Community Hall / Venue Booking

content: Community Hall Booking Management is a user-centric, web-based platform designed to help Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) efficiently manage the booking of community halls for public and private events. It provides a seamless end-to-end solution for citizens and organizations to reserve community spaces for functions, gatherings, and social activities.
combined: [Community Hall _ Venue Booking] Community Hall Booking Management is a user-centric, web-based platform designed to help Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) efficiently manage the booking of community halls for public and private events. It provides a seamless end-to-end solution for citizens and organizations to reserve community spaces for functions, gatherings, and social activities.

content: This intuitive module simplifies the booking process through a single-window system, enabling quick provisional approvals and smooth integration with other UPYOG modules. It ensures transparent handling of booking fees, security deposits, and refunds. ULB officials can process in-person booking requests through a dedicated interface, while user profiles and previous bookings are stored for future reference.
combined: [Community Hall _ Venue Booking] This intuitive module simplifies the booking process through a single-window system, enabling quick provisional approvals and smooth integration with other UPYOG modules. It ensures transparent handling of booking fees, security deposits, and refunds. ULB officials can process in-person booking requests through a dedicated interface, while user profiles and previous bookings are stored for future reference.

content: The module not only enhances citizen convenience and service delivery but also contributes to municipal revenue growth by maximizing the usage and efficient management of community hall resources.
combined: [Community Hall _ Venue Booking] The module not only enhances citizen convenience and service delivery but also contributes to municipal revenue growth by maximizing the usage and efficient management of community hall resources.

content: To provide a single-window digital platform for booking community halls and venues.

content: The E-Waste Management system offers a comprehensive, user-friendly platform that enables citizens to responsibly dispose of their electronic waste from the comfort of their homes. This end-to-end solution simplifies the entire process by allowing users to initiate e-waste collection requests online. Citizens can conveniently describe the electronic items they wish to discard, including details such as type and quantity. Users are required to provide their personal and address details to facilitate smooth and timely doorstep collection. Once the request is submitted, citizens can track the status of their application in real-time through the portal, receiving updates at each stage of the process.
combined: [E-Waste Management] The E-Waste Management system offers a comprehensive, user-friendly platform that enables citizens to responsibly dispose of their electronic waste from the comfort of their homes. This end-to-end solution simplifies the entire process by allowing users to initiate e-waste collection requests online. Citizens can conveniently describe the electronic items they wish to discard, including details such as type and quantity. Users are required to provide their personal and address details to facilitate smooth and timely doorstep collection. Once the request is submitted, citizens can track the status of their application in real-time through the portal, receiving updates at each stage of the process.

content: Trade Licence Issuance and Payment enables local government bodies to regulate trading establishments. It also serves to protect the interest of the public at large against possible health hazards and inconveniences that can be caused by any business operations. With UPYOG-TL Issuance and Payment traders can obtain the trade certificate in a simplified manner and ensure compliance with rules and safety guidelines issued by the government. The module offers the citizens and governance bodies a convenient and transparent means of processing trade licenses.
combined: [Trade License Issuance and Payment] Trade Licence Issuance and Payment enables local government bodies to regulate trading establishments. The module offers the citizens and governance bodies a convenient and transparent means of processing trade licenses.

content: The TL Issuance and payment module offers the citizens and governance bodies a convenient and transparent means of processing trade licenses. Trade license is the permission issued by the local governing bodies to carry on specified business or trading activity within the authorized area. It is a mandatory document required to run a business or commercial activity of any type.

content: Public Grievances & Redressal
combined: [Public Grievances & Redressal] Public Grievances & Redressal

content: Public Grievance & Redressal (PGR) is a web and mobile-enabled system designed to register and resolve public grievances. The seamless interface enables citizens to submit their grievances anytime and from anywhere. The complaints are routed to the concerned municipal departments and employees who work towards resolving the issues within a specified time limit. This digitized and easily configurable platform facilitates speedy and efficient resolution of civic complaints while providing the local urban bodies with an intuitive system that categorizes issues and helps them to initiate corrective actions, without any delay.
combined: [Public Grievances & Redressal] Public Grievance & Redressal (PGR) is a web and mobile-enabled system designed to register and resolve public grievances. The seamless interface enables citizens to submit their grievances anytime and from anywhere. The complaints are routed to the concerned municipal departments and employees who work towards resolving the issues within a specified time limit. This digitized and easily configurable platform facilitates speedy and efficient resolution of civic complaints while providing the local urban bodies with an intuitive system that categorizes issues and helps them to initiate corrective actions, without any delay.

content: Construction & Demolition Waste Management
combined: [Construction & Demolition Waste Management] Construction & Demolition Waste Management

content: The Construction & Demolition Waste Management module is a digital platform that enables citizens to responsibly dispose of construction and demolition waste. The system provides a step-by-step workflow for raising waste pick-up requests or directly depositing waste at designated facility centers. It captures all relevant details such as waste type, quantity, location, and ownership, ensuring proper handling and compliance with environmental regulations.
combined: [Construction & Demolition Waste Management] The Construction & Demolition Waste Management module is a digital platform that enables citizens to responsibly dispose of construction and demolition waste. The system provides a step-by-step workflow for raising waste pick-up requests or directly depositing waste at designated facility centers. It captures all relevant details such as waste type, quantity, location, and ownership, ensuring proper handling and compliance with environmental regulations.

content: The module facilitates smooth interaction between citizens, authorized collection agencies, and municipal staff, promoting safe disposal, recycling, and sustainable urban management practices. It also provides real-time tracking of requests, notifications, and reports for better monitoring and operational efficiency.

content: Advertisement Booking Management is a user-centric, web-based platform designed to help Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) manage public advertisement spaces efficiently. It provides a seamless end-to-end solution for businesses and individuals to book public spaces for promoting events and commercial activities.
combined: [Advertisement_Hoardings] Advertisement Booking Management is a user-centric, web-based platform designed to help Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) manage public advertisement spaces efficiently. It provides a seamless end-to-end solution for businesses and individuals to book public spaces for promoting events and commercial activities.

content: This intuitive module simplifies the booking process through a single-window system, enabling quick provisional approvals and easy integration with other UPYOG modules. It also offers transparent handling of security deposits and refunds. ULB officials can manage in-person booking requests through a dedicated interface, while user profiles and past applications are retained for future use.
